regime_filter.summary: Exposure is updated on a daily basis using a buffered 3-state regime model with 200DMA, 63D momentum, 0.50% hysteresis band, and 2-day confirmation. Risk-off sleeve is TAIL, DBMF.
regime_filter.vix_crash_filter: Active ONLY if Price < MA200 AND VIX > 40.0

notes: Universe is reconstructed point-in-time using current S&P1500 membership plus Wikipedia change events.
Current universe combines S&P500, S&P400, and S&P600.
Ranking uses historical slice through rebalance date close.
Buffer Ranking Applied: Buy top 15, Hold existing if ranked <= 25.
Geometric multiplicative scoring and RS (Relative Strength) vs SPY are applied to stock selection.
Dynamic Volatility Targeting is applied: minimum weight denominator floors at recent SPY 20D Volatility.
Asymmetric Systemic Crash Filter: Triggers Risk-Off if Price < MA200 AND VIX > 40.0. Ignored in uptrends.
Selected stock portfolio is applied with a 1-day execution lag.
Exposure signal is applied with a 1-day execution lag.
Transaction cost is applied when total portfolio weights change on execution day.
Stock selection is monthly, while exposure adjustment is daily.
Absolute momentum filter requires 63D return > 0 and 252D return > 0.
Sector cap limits selected names to reduce concentration risk.
Regime filter uses a 0.50% buffer around the moving average and 2-day confirmation to reduce whipsaw.
Risk-off sleeve uses TAIL, DBMF only.
Quality is not yet applied in backtest to avoid look-ahead bias.
